revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 8 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 8 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月8日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]13年<!--（[[794年]]_月_日）--> - [[桓武天皇]]が、山背国を[[山城国]]と改め、新京を[[平安京]]と称する詔を発布 * [[寛永]]6年<!--（[[1629年]]_月_日）--> - 「勅許の紫衣」を幕府が無視・反対したことに悲憤し、[[後水尾天皇]]が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]]）に譲位
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月7日 (旧暦)|11月7日]] 翌日[[11月9日 (旧暦)|11月9日]] - 前月[[10月8日 (旧暦)|10月8日]] 翌月[[12月8日 (旧暦)|12月8日]] *新暦[[11月8日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 ==

{{stub}}

{{Lunar November}} '''November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 8'''<!--Lunar November8 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延暦]]13年（[[ユリウス暦]][[794年]][[12月4日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]が、山背国を[[山城国]]と改め、新京を[[平安京]]と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]]の跡地である[[近江国]]古津も[[大津市|大津]]に復されている）。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[12月22日]]） - [[紫衣事件]]で、[[後水尾天皇]]が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]]）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]]13年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1516年]][[12月1日]]） - [[宇都宮成綱]]、[[戦国大名]]、[[下野国|下野]][[宇都宮氏]]の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468年]]） == Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 8''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の8日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天宝}}14年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|755|ja|755}} {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}） – 安史の乱が発生。唐の節度使であった安禄山と史思明が蜂起し、内乱状態となった。 * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1635|ja|1635}} {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}） – 江戸幕府は寺社奉行を新たに設置した. * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}） – 江戸幕府は島原の乱の鎮圧のため、板倉重昌らを派遣した. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 9|ja|12月9日}}） – 明治政府は、12月2日（旧暦）の翌日をもって太陰太陽暦を廃止し、太陽暦の採用を決定した.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}15年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}） – 黒田孝高（武将、享年1604年）. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|January 19|ja|1月19日}}） – 小金井喜美子（小説家・随筆家、森鷗外の妹、享年1956年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|宝暦}}7年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}}） – 久留島喜内（和算家、約1660年頃）.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|27|11|29|10|28|12|11|1128}}

[[sn:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 8''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の8日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天宝}}14年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|755|ja|755}} {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}） – 安史の乱が発生。唐の節度使であった安禄山と史思明が蜂起し、内乱状態となった。 * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}12年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1635|ja|1635}} {{ill|December 18|ja|12月18日}}） – 江戸幕府は寺社奉行を新たに設置した. * {{ill|Ken'ei|ja|寛永}}14年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1637|ja|1637}} {{ill|December 25|ja|12月25日}}） – 江戸幕府は島原の乱の鎮圧のため、板倉重昌らを派遣した. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 9|ja|12月9日}}） – 明治政府は、12月2日（旧暦）の翌日をもって太陰太陽暦を廃止し、太陽暦の採用を決定した.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}15年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1546|ja|1546}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}） – 黒田孝高（武将、享年1604年）. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871}} {{ill|January 19|ja|1月19日}}） – 小金井喜美子（小説家・随筆家、森鷗外の妹、享年1956年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|宝暦}}7年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1758|ja|1758}} {{ill|January 9|ja|1月9日}}） – 久留島喜内（和算家、約1660年頃）.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|27|11|29|10|28|12|11|1128}}

Text replacement - "[[ユリウス暦]]" to "[[Julian Calendar]]"
Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template

[[sn:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[延暦]]13年（[[Julian Calendar]][[794]][[12月4日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]が、山背国を[[山城国]]と改め、新京を[[平安京]]と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]]の跡地である[[近江国]]古津も[[大津市|大津]]に復されている）。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1629]][[12月22日]]） - [[紫衣事件]]で、[[後水尾天皇]]が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]]）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]]13年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1516]][[12月1日]]） - [[宇都宮成綱]]、[[戦国大名]]、[[下野国|下野]][[宇都宮氏]]の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]]） == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

[[sn:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}}13rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[794]][[12月4日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]が、山背国を[[山城国]]と改め、新京を[[平安京]]と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]]の跡地である[[近江国]]古津も[[大津市|大津]]に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}6th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1629]][[12月22日]]） - [[紫衣事件]]で、[[後水尾天皇]]が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]]）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]]13rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1516]][[12月1日]]） - [[宇都宮成綱]]、[[戦国大名]]、[[下野国|下野]][[宇都宮氏]]の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]]） == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[12月4日]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[山城国]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[12月22日]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[山城国]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、[[戦国大名]] 、[[下野国|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ） == See Also ==

[[sn:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[山城国]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、[[戦国大名]] 、[[下野国|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[Yamashiro Province ]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==

[[sn:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[Yamashiro Province ]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} 、[[Shimotsuke Province|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ） == See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[Yamashiro Province ]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} 、[[Shimotsuke Province|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] [[zh:十一月初八]] [[en:draft:November 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[Yamashiro Province ]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} 、[[Shimotsuke Province|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[Yamashiro Province ]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} 、[[Shimotsuke Province|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kaika era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} {{ill|157 BC}} {{ill|December 11}}) – Emperor Kaika, the 9th Emperor of Japan, ascended to the throne. <ref>[https://example.com Reference needed]</ref> * In the 4th year of the Kenkō era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} {{ill|316}} {{ill|December 12}}) – The Western Jin Dynasty collapsed. * In the 1st year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1688}} {{ill|December 4}}) – Tokugawa Tsunayoshi appointed Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu as his advisor. * In the 4th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871}} {{ill|December 23}}) – Five of Japan’s first female exchange students, including Umeko Tsuda, departed from Yokohama for the United States. * In the 5th year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872}} {{ill|December 12}}) – A governmental edict abolished traditional formal attire (such as kabuto and hakama) in favor of Western dress.
== Births == * In the 2nd year of the Jishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1178}} {{ill|December 22}}) – Emperor Antoku, the 81st Emperor of Japan, ascended to the throne (died 1185).<ref>{{Kotobank|安徳天皇}}</ref>
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Genji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864}} {{ill|December 10}}) – Kunishi Chisanao, a senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born 1842). * Also in the 1st year of the Genji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} 1864, December 10) – Fukuhara Motomi, another senior retainer of the Chōshū Domain (born 1815).
== Commemorations == <!-- (None) -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|11|11|13|10|12|12|11|1112}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十二]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 13rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[794]] [[December 4]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] が、山背国を[[Yamashiro Province ]] と改め、新京を[[平安京]] と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]] の跡地である[[近江国]] 古津も[[大津市|大津]] に復されている）。 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 6th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1629]] [[December 22]] ） - [[紫衣事件]] で、[[後水尾天皇]] が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]] ）に譲位
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 13rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1516]] [[December 1]] ） - [[宇都宮成綱]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō|12=draft}} 、[[Shimotsuke Province|下野]] [[宇都宮氏]] の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初八]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[794]] {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1629]] {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).
== Births == <!-- (None) -->
== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1516]] {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月8日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]13年（[[ユリウス暦]][[794年]][[12月4日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]が、山背国を[[山城国]]と改め、新京を[[平安京]]と称する詔を発布（この詔によって併せて、[[大津宮]]の跡地である[[近江国]]古津も[[大津市|大津]]に復されている）。 * [[寛永]]6年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1629年]][[12月22日]]） - [[紫衣事件]]で、[[後水尾天皇]]が7歳の第二皇女興子内親王（[[明正天皇]]）に譲位
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[永正]]13年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1516年]][[12月1日]]） - [[宇都宮成綱]]、[[戦国大名]]、[[下野国|下野]][[宇都宮氏]]の第17代当主、宇都宮氏中興の祖（* [[1468年]]） == 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840260]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 8|qq=November 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1516|1516]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|7|11|9|10|8|12|11|1108|qq=}}

== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. == Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1516|1516]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).

== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).

== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1516|1516]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. == Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1516|1516]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初八]][[zh:十一月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初八]][[zh:十一月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840260]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 8|qq=November 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1516|1516]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初八]][[zh:十一月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初八]][[zh:十一月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初八]][[zh:十一月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840260]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 8|qq=November 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1629|1629]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1516|1516]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).

== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:794|794]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * In the 13th year of the Enryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|794|en|794|WD=Q30887|lt=794}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4}}) – Emperor Kanmu issued an edict renaming Yamashiro Province and declared the new capital to be Heian-kyō. By this edict, the site of the former Ōtsu Palace in Omi Province was also restored as the city of Ōtsu. * In the 6th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1629|en|1629|WD=Q6847|lt=1629}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22}}) – During the Shii Incident, Emperor Go-Suido abdicated in favor of his 7‑year‑old second daughter, Princess Kōko (later known as Emperor Meisei).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 13th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}}) – Utsunomiya Naritsuna, a Sengoku daimyo and the 17th head of the Utsunomiya clan of Shimotsuke Province, regarded as the restorer of the Utsunomiya clan (born 1468).
